meta.name: Neighborhood enrichment
meta.description: Which brain regions border each other more (or less) than chance, from a permutation test over the spatial graph.
meta.provenance: Adapted from the squidpy 'Neighborhood enrichment' vignette; targets the visium_hne example (hexagonal grid, obs['cluster'] brain-region annotation).

readme: Which brain regions border each other more (or less) than chance, from a permutation test over the spatial graph. Builds a hexagonal-grid spatial graph, then runs the neighborhood-enrichment permutation test grouped by `obs['cluster']`.
